zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_1: $self$立刻合上书本，满眼期待："好啊！正好我无聊死了！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_2: $self$爽快地站起身，拍拍裙摆："聊什么呢？算我一个！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_3: $self$僵硬地点点头，低着头默默地走了过去。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_4: $self$似乎想拒绝，但看到对方的眼神后又把话咽了回去。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_5: $self$愣了一下，随即指着自己："诶？叫我吗？好吧……"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_6: $self$有些意外地眨眨眼，但还是跟了上去。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_7: $self$笑着向身边的$target$搭话："这天气真不错，不是吗？"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_8: $self$似乎对$target$的话题很感兴趣，主动凑近了一些。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Begin_9: $self$手里拿着饮料，顺势在$target$对面坐了下来："介意我坐这儿吗？"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Tryjoin_1: $self$凑到一个正在聊天的小圈子旁："听起来很有趣，介意加我一个吗？"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Tryjoin_2: $self$试探性地问道："你们在聊那个新游戏吗？我也在玩！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Joined_1: $self$开心地拉开椅子坐下："太好了！我跟你们说……"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Joined_2: $self$松了一口气，脸上露出了融入集体的轻松笑容。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_Refused_1: $self$尴尬地收回手，讪讪地笑了笑："啊……没事，你们继续。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_Refused_2: $self$有些失落地垂下眼帘，默默地转身离开了。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_1: $self$歉意地笑了笑："抱歉，我们在聊一些私事，不太方便。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_2: $self$做了一个‘暂停’的手势："稍微等一下好吗？我们需要一点私人空间。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_3: $self$冷冷地瞥了对方一眼："我们在忙，没看到吗？"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_4: $self$直接无视了对方的存在，提高音量继续之前的话题。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_5: $self$热情地招手："来来来！正缺人呢！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_6: $self$往旁边挤了挤，腾出一个位置："快坐！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_7: $self$的话语戛然而止，紧张地看了一眼对方，默默点头。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_8: $self$身体僵硬地往旁边挪开，不敢有任何异议。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_9: $self$有些诧异地停下话头，点了点头："呃……如果你想听的话。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Join_10: $self$虽然有些不解，但还是礼貌地让出了位置。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Ongoing_1: $self$时不时点头附和，看起来聊得很投机。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Ongoing_2: $self$捂着嘴轻笑出声，显然是被$target$的笑话逗乐了。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Ongoing_3: $self$神情专注地倾听着，偶尔插上一两句自己的见解。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_1: $self$下意识地缩了缩脖子，说话的声音都变小了。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_2: $self$有些慌乱地避开视线，手指不安地绞在一起。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_3: $self$脸色变得有些苍白，身体微微发抖，似乎想找个借口离开。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_4: 看到对方的瞬间，$self$脸上的笑容僵了一下，随即别过头去。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_5: $self$压低了声音，眉头微皱："怎么偏偏这个时候来……"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_6: $self$抱着双臂，原本放松的姿态瞬间变得充满防御性。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_7: 看到来人，$self$的眼睛亮了一下，兴奋地挥手："嘿！这儿！快过来一起！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_8: $self$往旁边挪了挪位置，拍拍身边的空位示意对方坐下。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_9: $self$露出了惊喜的表情："正说到你呢，你就来了！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_10: $self$的视线立刻黏在了对方身上，眼神变得有些迷离。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_11: $self$无意识地咬了咬嘴唇，脸颊泛起一抹红晕。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_12: $self$调整了一下坐姿，试图展现出自己最迷人的角度。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_13: $self$礼貌性地对其点点头，随后继续之前的话题。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_14: $self$只是瞥了一眼来人，并没有太大的反应。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_15: $self$平静地打了个招呼："哟，你也在这儿啊。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_1: $self$抱歉地摆摆手："下次吧，我现在手头有点事。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_2: $self$指了指自己的耳朵："我想先听完这首歌，你们聊。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_3: $self$不耐烦地啧了一声："没空，别烦我。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_4: $self$戴上耳机，假装没听到对方的邀请。
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_interaction_talk_accept: "真的假的？太搞笑了吧！"$self$笑出声来
$self$："你讲得挺有意思的，不继续了吗？"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_5: $self$满足地伸了个懒腰："这正是我想要的答案！太棒了！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_6: $self$眼含笑意地看着对方："谢谢你，这对我帮助很大。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_7: $self$虽然得到了信息，但脸色依旧阴沉。"知道了，你可以走了。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_8: $self$勉强挤出一个笑容，眼神却很冷淡。"行吧，就这样。"
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_interaction_talk_accept: "嗯……是啊，挺好的。"$self$说着却目光飘忽，明显没在听。
"所以……你到底想说什么？"$self$微微歪头，语气中带着一丝不耐。
"嗯……大概吧。"$self$含糊地回应，看起来只是想快点结束话题。
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_9: 虽然没聊出结果，但$self$还是笑得很开心："和你聊天真有意思！"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_10: $self$意犹未尽地舔了舔嘴唇："时间过得真快，下次再继续吧。"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_11: $self$叹了口气，脸上写满了疲惫："完全不知道你在说什么……"
zh-cn.com_interaction_talk_12: $self$有些恼火地揉了揉太阳穴："算了，这就是对牛弹琴。"

en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_1: $self$ immediately shuts her book, eyes full of anticipation: "Sure! I was bored to death anyway!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_2: $self$ stands up briskly, dusting off her skirt: "What are we talking about? Count me in!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_3: $self$ nods stiffly, lowering her head as she walks over silently.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_4: $self$ seems about to refuse, but swallows her words after seeing the look in their eyes.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_5: $self$ pauses, then points to herself: "Eh? You mean me? Alright..."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_6: $self$ blinks in surprise, but follows along anyway.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_7: $self$ smiles and speaks to $target$ beside her: "Nice weather, isn't it?"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_8: $self$ seems very interested in $target$'s topic and leans in closer.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Begin_9: $self$ sits down opposite $target$, holding her drink: "Mind if I sit here?"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Tryjoin_1: $self$ leans into a small group chatting: "Sounds fun, mind if I join?"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Tryjoin_2: $self$ asks tentatively: "Are you guys talking about that new game? I play it too!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Joined_1: $self$ happily pulls out a chair and sits down: "Great! Let me tell you..."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Joined_2: $self$ lets out a sigh of relief, a relaxed smile of belonging appearing on her face.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_Refused_1: $self$ awkwardly withdraws her hand, laughing sheepishly: "Ah... never mind, carry on."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_Refused_2: $self$ lowers her eyes in disappointment and silently turns to leave.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_1: $self$ smiles apologetically: "Sorry, we're discussing something private, it's not a good time."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_2: $self$ makes a 'pause' gesture: "Can you give us a moment? We need a little privacy."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_3: $self$ glances coldly at them: "We're busy, can't you see?"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_4: $self$ ignores their presence completely, raising her voice to continue the previous topic.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_5: $self$ waves enthusiastically: "Come on over! We need more people!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_6: $self$ squeezes to the side to make room: "Sit! Quick!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_7: $self$ stops talking abruptly, glances nervously at them, and nods silently.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_8: $self$ stiffly moves aside, daring not to voice any objection.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_9: $self$ stops in surprise, then nods: "Uh... if you want to listen."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Join_10: $self$ looks puzzled but politely makes room.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Ongoing_1: $self$ nods along occasionally, seeming to be very engaged in the chat.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Ongoing_2: $self$ covers her mouth and giggles, clearly amused by $target$'s joke.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Ongoing_3: $self$ listens intently, occasionally interjecting with her own insights.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_1: $self$ subconsciously shrinks back, her voice dropping to a whisper.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_2: $self$ averts her gaze in panic, her fingers twisting together nervously.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_3: $self$ turns pale and trembles slightly, looking for an excuse to leave.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_4: Upon seeing them, $self$'s smile freezes, and she turns her head away.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_5: $self$ lowers her voice, frowning: "Why now, of all times..."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_6: $self$ crosses her arms, her relaxed posture instantly becoming defensive.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_7: Seeing them arrive, $self$'s eyes light up, and she waves excitedly: "Hey! Over here! Come join us!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_8: $self$ moves over, patting the empty seat beside her for them to sit.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_9: $self$ looks pleasantly surprised: "We were just talking about you, and here you are!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_10: $self$'s gaze immediately glues to them, her eyes becoming slightly dreamy.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_11: $self$ unconsciously bites her lip, a flush rising on her cheeks.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_12: $self$ adjusts her sitting posture, trying to present her most charming angle.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_13: $self$ gives a polite nod, then continues with the previous topic.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_14: $self$ merely glances at the newcomer without much reaction.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_Interrupt_15: $self$ greets them calmly: "Oh, you're here too."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_1: $self$ waves apologetically: "Next time, I'm a bit tied up right now."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_2: $self$ points to her ear: "I want to finish this song first, you guys talk."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_3: $self$ clicks her tongue impatiently: "No time, don't bother me."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_4: $self$ puts on headphones, pretending not to hear the invitation.
en-us.kojo_default_com_interaction_talk_accept: "For real? That's hilarious!" $self$ laughs out loud.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_5: $self$ stretches with satisfaction: "That's exactly the answer I wanted! Awesome!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_6: $self$ looks at them with a smile: "Thank you, that helps a lot."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_7: $self$ received the info, but her expression remains dark. "Got it, you can go now."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_8: $self$ forces a smile, though her eyes remain cold. "Fine, let's leave it at that."
en-us.kojo_default_com_interaction_talk_accept: "Uh-huh... yeah. Sounds great." $self$ glances elsewhere, clearly tuned out.
"So... is there a point to this?" $self$ tilts her head slightly, impatience creeping into her tone.
"Mmm... I guess." $self$ replies vaguely, clearly just trying to end the topic.
en-us.com_interaction_talk_9: Even without a conclusion, $self$ smiles happily: "Chatting with you is really fun!"
en-us.com_interaction_talk_10: $self$ licks her lips, wanting more: "Time flies, let's continue next time."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_11: $self$ sighs, looking exhausted: "I have absolutely no idea what you're talking about..."
en-us.com_interaction_talk_12: $self$ rubs her temples in annoyance: "Forget it, it's like talking to a wall."
